"'''The Kaal Connection'''" is an article from [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 7|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 7]], written by [[Peter M. Schweighofer]] and [[Timothy Zahn]], and illustrated by [[David R. Deitrick]]. It was updated and reprinted in ''[[Classic Adventures: Volume Four — The Best of the Journal]]''.

Set in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]], it centers on attempts to claim the food planet [[Kaal/Legends|Kaal]] from crime lord [[Tirgee Benyalle]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] (represented by [[Uther Kermen|Kermen]]), [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] factions (represented by [[Utoxx Prentioch]]), and the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] (represented by the players). [[Talon Karrde]] also makes an appearance, and it is the first appearance of [[Jeng Droga]].
